            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        add_technology = fighter7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # fighter8 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = fighter8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        add_technology = fighter8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) ──

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1960 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1980 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=2012 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# more_modern_medium_airframe
#   year=2018 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_medium_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_medium_airframe
#   year=2030 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_novum_vexillum = {
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # more_modern_medium_airframe — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = more_modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = more_modern_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_medium_airframe — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_medium_airframe — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = future_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

# ── AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (14 techs) ──

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1980 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1980 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=2006 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2006 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2018 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=2018 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber5
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_novum_vexillum = {
    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = miniature_fighters
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars — 1946

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = aerial_hangars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_large_airframe — 1960

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = improved_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber4 — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber5 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        add_technology = strategic_bomber5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = modern_large_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) ──

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=2000 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# iw_uav_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=2006 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_uav_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=2018 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber4
#   year=2024 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber5
#   year=2030 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_uav_airframe — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_uav_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_uav_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_uav_airframe — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_uav_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_uav_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber4 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber5 — 2030

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_computing_machine — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = advanced_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_computing_machine — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = near_future_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_computing_machine — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = future_computing_machine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_fortification_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # excavation1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = excavation1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = excavation1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # land_fort_tech_1 — 1938

            NOT = { has_technology = land_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = land_fort_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # land_fort_tech_2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = land_fort_tech_2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }

        }
        add_technology = dispersed_industry8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_oil_processing — 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_oil_processing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = modern_oil_processing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # recycling_center_dod7a — 2028

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (7 techs) ──

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# hide_naval_facilities
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# atomic_research
#   year=2004 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=2012 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_novum_vexillum = {
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # hide_naval_facilities — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hide_naval_facilities }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = hide_naval_facilities
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # atomic_research — 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (12 techs) ──

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio_detection
#   year=2002 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=2004 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=2016 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_centimetric_radar
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_quantum_radar
#   year=2024 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_quantum_radar
#   year=2028 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_quantum_radar
#   year=2032 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = cavity_magnatron
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }

#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets

#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

#   year=1980 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# experimental_rockets
#   year=1980 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery2
#   year=2004 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillerya1
#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery3
#   year=2016 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_novum_vexillum = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = rocket_artillery
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery4 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_engines — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_rocket_bomber — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = experimental_rockets
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 — 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillerya1 — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillerya1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillerya1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (14 techs) ──

# coldwar_antiair
#   year=1980 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair0
#   year=1980 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=2000 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=2004 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=2008 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=2012 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=2012 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=2016 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=2020 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_antiair3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair7
#   year=2028 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair8
#   year=2032 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_novum_vexillum = {
    # coldwar_antiair — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coldwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair0 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_antiair0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair1 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair2 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair6 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_antiair3 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair7 — 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair8 — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=2020 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank7
#   year=2028 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank8
#   year=2032 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_novum_vexillum = {
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coldwar_antitank — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coldwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank6 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank7 — 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank8 — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# interwar_artillery
#   year=2004 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=2008 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=2016 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery6
#   year=2024 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_novum_vexillum = {
    # railway_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coldwar_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coldwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_dp_light_battery — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery1 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 2004
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery2 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery6 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery3 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) ──

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70
