#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech — 1943

    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech — 1943

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech — 1943

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }

arm_grant_land_infantry_novum_vexillum = {
    # infantry_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = rangers_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): special_forces_mountaineers
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): ski_troops
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): rangers
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): special_forces_recon
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mountaineers_combat_1
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mountaineers_combat_2
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mountaineers_combat_3
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): mountaineers_keystone_1

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_commandoes
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_expeditionary
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_commandos_demolition
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_expeditionary_blowtorch

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_commandoes_mechanised_non_mtg
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): marines_expeditionary_support
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): special_forces_paratroopers
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): paras_dispersed_drop
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): paras_combat_drop

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = advanced_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_special_forces — 2004

            NOT = { has_technology = improved_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2004 }

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (23 techs) ──

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_80s
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank1
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry1 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_80s — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_chassis_80s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_80s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank1 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_00s — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_chassis_00s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_00s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank3 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_10s — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_chassis_10s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_10s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank4 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry4 — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_chassis_20s — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_chassis_20s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_20s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank5 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_tank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry5 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (12 techs) ──

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry3]

# light_mechanized_infantry5
#   year=2018 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry4]

# light_mechanized_infantry6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_novum_vexillum = {
    # mechanised_infantry — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry1 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry2 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry3 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry4 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry5 — 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry6 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = light_mechanized_infantry6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (20 techs) ──

# basic_medium_tank_chassis

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_80s
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank3
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank4
#   year=2006 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank5
#   year=2012 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank6
#   year=2018 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank7
#   year=2024 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank8
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# IFV_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank1 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank2 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_80s — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_80s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_80s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank3 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_00s — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_00s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_00s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank4 — 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_10s — 2010

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_10s }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }

#   year=1960 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    # main_battle_tank — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1960 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry1
#   year=1980 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# technicality_tech
#   year=1980 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nonnsb_technicality_tech2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# technicality_tech2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry3
#   year=2012 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry5
#   year=2030 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_novum_vexillum = {
    # tech_trucks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry1 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nonsnb_technicality_tech — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nonsnb_technicality_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = nonsnb_technicality_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # technicality_tech — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = technicality_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = technicality_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nonnsb_technicality_tech2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nonnsb_technicality_tech2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

        add_technology = nonnsb_technicality_tech2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = technicality_tech2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

        add_technology = technicality_tech2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry3 — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_land_support_novum_vexillum = {
    # armored_train — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = armored_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech — 1938

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_maintenance_tech — 1938

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_technology = sp_armored_maintenance_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# engine_tech_3
#   year=2005 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# engine_tech_6

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_novum_vexillum = {
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        }
        add_technology = modern_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_1 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_1 — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_2 — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_3 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_3 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_4 — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_4 — 2010
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2010 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_5 — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_5 — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_6 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_6 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (20 techs) ──

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_battleship
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_battleship
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship3
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_battlecruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battlecruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battleship — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_heavy — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_battleship — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = near_future_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_hull_heavy — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_battleship — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = future_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship3 — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / CARRIERS (20 techs) ──

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70
