#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_novum_vexillum = {
    # sp_refined_pykrete — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_carrier — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_carrier — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_hull_carrier — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_carrier — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = future_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_novum_vexillum = {
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # modern_sonar — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_patrol_boat
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ship_hull_light — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_sonar — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_destroyer — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = future_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_patrol_boat — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_patrol_boat }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = future_patrol_boat
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (6 techs) ──

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_heavy_cruiser — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_heavy_cruiser — 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# future_light_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_novum_vexillum = {
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_light_cruiser — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_airplane_launcher — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # improved_light_cruiser — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_airplane_launcher — 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # advanced_light_cruiser — 2016
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_cruiser — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): near_future_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # near_future_airplane_launcher — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_airplane_launcher }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # near_future_light_cruiser — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_light_cruiser }

    # future_ship_hull_cruiser — 2032

            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_cruiser }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): future_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # future_light_cruiser — 2032

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# future_submarine
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines_novum_vexillum = {
    # basic_submarine_snorkel — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_submarine — 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine — 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_submarine — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine — 2008
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2008 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2016 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_submarine — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = near_future_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # near_future_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine — 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = near_future_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2024 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_submarine }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            NOT = { has_technology = future_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2032 }
